scene_title: Besta de sete cabecas sobre cidade moderna
narrative_beat: Criatura colossal carmesim sobre arranha-ceus P&B

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid colossal seven-headed Beast of Revelation in scarlet crimson and golden flames with multiple glowing eyes in dominant pose against stormy sky with lightning in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the seven heads with multiple glowing eyes in dominant pose
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated modern city at night with grey illuminated skyscrapers and tiny crowds below in background

composition.foreground: beast in vivid scarlet crimson gold

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, crimson saturation, anamorphic flare

mood.emotion: ancient vision of the beast confronting modern scale

symbolism.primary: the seven-headed beast as system — not monster but network
symbolism.secondary: tiny crowds below as scale of the submission demanded

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
